'''howazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphosurous|xiphosurous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphosurous|xiphosurous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| howazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:howazithi|howazithi]] || [[word:howaziji|howaziji]] || [[word:howazishi|howazishi]] || [[word:howaziki|howaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:howazuthuthu|howazuthuthu]] || [[word:howazujuju|howazujuju]] || [[word:howazushushu|howazushushu]] || [[word:howazukuku|howazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:howazuthu|howazuthu]] || [[word:howazuju|howazuju]] || [[word:howazushu|howazushu]] || [[word:howazuku|howazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:howazufthuf|howazufthuf]] || [[word:howazufjuf|howazufjuf]] || [[word:howazufshuf|howazufshuf]] || [[word:howazufkuf|howazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:howazethe|howazethe]] || [[word:howazeje|howazeje]] || [[word:howazeshe|howazeshe]] || [[word:howazeke|howazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:howazothotho|howazothotho]] || [[word:howazojojo|howazojojo]] || [[word:howazoshosho|howazoshosho]] || [[word:howazokoko|howazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:howazotho|howazotho]] || [[word:howazojo|howazojo]] || [[word:howazosho|howazosho]] || [[word:howazoko|howazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:howazofthof|howazofthof]] || [[word:howazofjof|howazofjof]] || [[word:howazofshof|howazofshof]] || [[word:howazofkof|howazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:howazĂŻfthĂŻf|howazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfjĂŻf|howazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfshĂŻf|howazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfkĂŻf|howazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:howazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|howazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|howazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|howazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|howazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:howazĂŻfthĂŻf|howazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfjĂŻf|howazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfshĂŻf|howazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfkĂŻf|howazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:howazĂŻfthĂŻf|howazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfjĂŻf|howazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfshĂŻf|howazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:howazĂŻfkĂŻf|howazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:howazĂŠthĂŠ|howazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:howazĂŠjĂŠ|howazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:howazĂŠshĂŠ|howazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:howazĂŠkĂŠ|howazĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:howazathatha|howazathatha]] || [[word:howazajaja|howazajaja]] || [[word:howazashasha|howazashasha]] || [[word:howazakaka|howazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:howazatha|howazatha]] || [[word:howazaja|howazaja]] || [[word:howazasha|howazasha]] || [[word:howazaka|howazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:howazafthaf|howazafthaf]] || [[word:howazafjaf|howazafjaf]] || [[word:howazafshaf|howazafshaf]] || [[word:howazafkaf|howazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:howazasha|howazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:howazshĂ«sha|howazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:howazrosha|howazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:howazmusha|howazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:howazyasha|howazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohowaznkshĂ«sha|gohowaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohowaznkrosha|gohowaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohowaznkmusha|gohowaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohowaznkyasha|gohowaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:howawazasha|howawazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:howawazshĂ«sha|howawazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:howawazrosha|howawazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:howawazmusha|howawazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:howawazyasha|howawazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohowawaznkshĂ«sha|gohowawaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohowawaznkrosha|gohowawaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohowawaznkmusha|gohowawaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohowawaznkyasha|gohowawaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hewĂŠzasha|hewĂŠzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hewĂŠzshĂ«sha|hewĂŠzshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hewĂŠzrosha|hewĂŠzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hewĂŠzmusha|hewĂŠzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hewĂŠzyasha|hewĂŠzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohewĂŠznkshĂ«sha|gohewĂŠznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohewĂŠznkrosha|gohewĂŠznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohewĂŠznkmusha|gohewĂŠznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohewĂŠznkyasha|gohewĂŠznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:howfazasha|howfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:howfazshĂ«sha|howfazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:howfazrosha|howfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:howfazmusha|howfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:howfazyasha|howfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohowfaznkshĂ«sha|gohowfaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohowfaznkrosha|gohowfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohowfaznkmusha|gohowfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohowfaznkyasha|gohowfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
